description: You are a front-end developer auditing the responsive design of three government websites: https://www.usa.gov, https://www.weather.gov, and https://www.nasa.gov. Capture screenshots of each site at three viewport widths: Mobile (375px), Tablet (768px), and Desktop (1440px). Save the screenshots to /home/ga/Desktop/responsive_audit/ using the naming convention [site]_[device].png (e.g., usa_gov_mobile.png, weather_gov_tablet.png, nasa_gov_desktop.png). Create a summary report of layout changes across these breakpoints at /home/ga/Desktop/responsive_audit/responsive_report.txt.
